title: TechTopiaUtils - Legacy
description: A small mod which is primarly used for the Modpack "TechTopia".
body:
# 🚀 TechTopia Legacy Mod

A small content expansion for Minecraft, adding a challenging endgame boss and a few unique custom items, blocks, and machines.

## ✨ Features

### ⚔️ Defeat a Powerful Boss
Face an extremely difficult custom boss designed to test even the most advanced players.

### 🛠️ Creative Crafting Item
Unlock a special creative-tier item that allows you to craft virtually any item you desire.

### 🧱 Custom Blocks & Machines
Discover a small collection of custom blocks and machines used to create the materials required for summoning the boss.

## 📜 Legacy Status

> ⚠️ **Important Notice**
>
> This mod is now considered a **legacy project**.
>
> A completely new and significantly expanded version is currently in development as part of the upcoming **TechTopia** modpack.
>
> The legacy version will continue to be maintained and used within the original **TechTopia** experience.

## ❤️ Thank You

Thank you for playing and supporting the TechTopia project. More content is planned for the future!
